title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as the first Colosseum fighters clash while Luffy tries to hide his identity and new rivals like Cavendish, Burgess, and Bartolomeo stand out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Over there... the a-Rank war criminal from the sea battle of Dias...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's neck- Chopper Slayman!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The made- Up massacre adventurer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Orombus, the ruler!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Former bounty hunters involved in the bombing of a government institution!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Abdullah and JEET!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: On recommendation- action by the Donquixote family

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The brutal "Over 100 million" pirate!! Bellamy the hyena!!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: And although they're not here right now, "The nobleman pirate, Cavendish"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And the insane rookie from one year ago, "Balto Romo," are also said to be parti-ripating.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Think none of them are plotting anything!? I expect that even you are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The first round is a battle royal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Only those who survive it have a chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: A- Block is about to start!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: totaling a-block up with b, c, and d- blocks ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Out of over 550 fighters, after the first round ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Only four winners will, emerge!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: And you two... you bribed your way into the same block, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: pure Council- dance.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: What block am I in?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I believe we already informed you at the Registry desk, but...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You're number 556, in c-block.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Our motivations may differ

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But depending on whose hands the Mera Mera no mi falls into...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tomorrow, the world will shift a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Without any further ado, let's get out there and do our best, ladies and gents!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fighters' preparations room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UOHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So I can really use anything in here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As far as weapons, the only things prohibited are firearms.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: armor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Helmets!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A statue of a half-naked old man fighter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I want it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll take some armor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: AND A COOLER HELPMENT THAN OLD MAN STATE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Looks good...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: NEAT ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All the women are fainting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hey, what's wrong !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It's... that's noble- man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Noble- Man!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Wish usopp and the others could see in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's no good he's just too pro- cattle...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: ... look! It's him! It's Cavendish ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Is this the equipment room?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The nobleman pirate!!? Is it really him!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's so gorgeous

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah, you, over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: that won't do. There's a weight limit for one's gear.

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
